title: Partial unitization not a division
doc_html:
§71.  Partial unitization not a division

Unitization of a portion of a tract burdened by a mineral servitude does not divide the servitude.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §71, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
doc_text:
§71.  Partial unitization not a division
Unitization of a portion of a tract burdened by a mineral servitude does not divide the servitude.
Acts 1974, No. 50, §71, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
